# The Cambridge International School Mangalore

## Overview
Cambridge School Mangalore is a top-ranked CBSE school in Adyar, Mangaluru, offering academic excellence from Nursery to Grade 10. Founded in 2007 under St. Lawrence Education Trust.

## Key Information
- **Location:** Near Sahyadri College Of Engineering, Adyar, Mangaluru, Karnataka 575007
- **Curriculum:** CBSE
- **Grades:** Nursery to Grade 10
- **Admissions:** Currently open for the 2025–26 academic year.
- **Contact:** +91 9686357711 | tcisadyarmangalore@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://apply.tcismangalore.org

## Features
- Outstanding board results
- Modern campus facilities including Science & ICT Labs, Library, Math Lab
- Comprehensive sports and co-curricular programs
- Transport routes covering Kalladka, Sajipa, Bantwal, BC Road, Ullal, Mangalore City, and Lalbagh.
